subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! God willing, mayest thou be graced by divine bounties. Be thou not sorrowful at that which hath befallen the friends of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حسن انشاء الله بعنایات الهی فایز باشی محزون مباش از آنچه بر دوستان حق از
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @chastisement and requital, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
